\tzpentry{ID4527}{Kinetic Term Laplacian Operator}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4527 introduces Kinetic Term Laplacian Operator as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[ K_{\mathrm{NL}}=\frac{\lVert \nabla^{2}\varphi\rVert}{\lVert \nabla\varphi\rVert^{2}}, \]
